category_sources: source_facts.description identifies a Hetzner Cloud command-line interface; official Hetzner Cloud docs reference the hcloud CLI.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name and current_curation.display-name both provide hcloud.
docs_sources: Official hetznercloud/cli repository includes the hcloud manual; official Hetzner Cloud API docs are the service documentation used by the CLI.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already set to https://github.com/hetznercloud/cli, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies Hetzner Cloud CLI; source_facts.package-manager includes cloud CLI package names across platforms.
